input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.5.9.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

            TITLE: the main hoop braces must be attached 160 mm or less below the top most surface of the

F.5.9.4 The Main Hoop Braces must be attached 160 mm or less below the top most surface of the 
Main Hoop.   
The Main Hoop Braces should be attached as near as possible to the top of the Main Hoop

final_answer: The Main Hoop Braces must be attached 160 mm or less below the top most surface of the Main Hoop. The Main Hoop Braces should be attached as near as possible to the top of the Main Hoop.
